login-tour.login-bar: You will receive a welcome email with your username and password. Enter them here in the login bar at the top of the LTS website.
login-tour.top-username: Enter your assigned username from the welcome email.
login-tour.top-password: Enter the password provided in your welcome email.
login-tour.login-button: Click the LOGIN button to access the system. You will be taken to the Login Credentials screen.
login-tour.credentials-panel: This is the Login Credentials panel. From here you can create a new password or continue to edit your user details.
login-tour.create-password-btn: Click Create New Password to set up your own password. Follow the instructions, then click Save.
login-tour.password-dialog: This dialog appears when you click Create New Password. Enter your new password and confirm it.
login-tour.confirm-password: Re-enter your new password to confirm it matches.
login-tour.password-rules: Your password must contain: minimum 8 characters, maximum 15 characters, at least 1 alphabet character and at least 1 number.
login-tour.save-btn: Click Save to save your new password.
login-tour.continue-btn: Click Continue to proceed to the next screen: Edit and Update User Details.

user-details-tour.alert-banner: Please ensure all your information is correct before proceeding.
user-details-tour.personal-info: Update your personal details here. Please take note of the mandatory fields marked with red asterisks. The yellow highlighted fields are compulsory.
user-details-tour.contact-info: Email 1 must be your work email address. Email 2 may be updated with another personal address for additional notifications.
user-details-tour.training-info: Contract information must always be accurate. If it needs to be updated, then your Training Officer or assistant can send an email to Support at LT Systems dot co dot za with the correct contract information.
user-details-tour.note-area: Please verify that all information is accurate and up to date.
user-details-tour.update-btn: Click the Update button to save all changes and move on to your LTS User Home Page.

home-tour.home-news: The NEWS section shows the latest updates on document deadlines and other information related to your programme.
home-tour.home-days-since: This section indicates the last day a document on LTS was created, worked on, and finalized.
home-tour.days-since-table: View when your Skill Review and 6NA documents were last Initiated, Worked On, and Finalised.
home-tour.home-open-items: This shows any Skill Reviews or 6NAs currently open and in progress.
home-tour.home-skills-section: This section gives you access to initiate new documents and view reports. Use the hyperlinks below to navigate.
home-tour.link-skill-review: Click Link to Skill Review to start a new Skill Review.
home-tour.link-6na: Click Link to 6NAs to start a new Six-Monthly Needs Analysis.
home-tour.link-status-report: Click here to view your Status Reports.
home-tour.link-last-6na: Click here to view detail reports of the last finalized 6NA.

help-tour.help-contact: If you need assistance, contact LTS Support at Support at LT Systems dot co dot za, or view training material and FAQ under Documents.
help-tour.help-email: Email the LTS support team at Support at LT Systems dot co dot za for any assistance.
help-tour.acca-docs: This section contains ACCA related documents including qualification guides, programme handbooks, RPL policies, and PCEF forms.
help-tour.training-docs: Here you will find all LTS training slides covering Skill Reviews, 6NA processes, and system guides.
help-tour.training-docs-list: Browse and download training slides 1 through 8, covering everything from logging in to finalizing a 6NA assessment.

trainee-sr-home-tour.step-0: Welcome to the LTS Home Page. From here you will initiate a Skill Review by clicking on the Link to Skill Review hyperlink. Let's walk through the key sections on this page first.
trainee-sr-home-tour.sr-news: The NEWS section is used to update trainees about document deadlines and important information.
trainee-sr-home-tour.sr-days-since: The Days Since Last section indicates the last day a document on LTS was created, worked on, and finalized. This helps you track your document activity.
trainee-sr-home-tour.sr-open-items: Open documents will be listed under Open Items. Any Skill Reviews or 6NAs currently in progress will appear here.
trainee-sr-home-tour.sr-link-skill-review: Click on the hyperlink Link to Skill Review to initiate a new skill review. This will take you to the Skill Review setup page where you can fill in the details.

trainee-sr-setup-tour.step-0: Now you need to fill in the details to set up your Skill Review. Follow the steps below to complete the setup.
trainee-sr-setup-tour.sr-reviewer-select: Select your Supervisor or Reviewer from the drop-down list. If you can't find your Reviewer or Supervisor, click on Show All Users. If they are still not listed, contact your office administrator to request that LTS Support create their profile.
trainee-sr-setup-tour.sr-client-desc: Add the Client Description. This is the assignment or engagement reference for the work being reviewed.
trainee-sr-setup-tour.sr-job-dates: Select the Job Start Date and Job End Date. Indicate the day that the work, project, or assignment started, and the day it was finalised.
trainee-sr-setup-tour.sr-assignment-desc: Add the Assignment Description. Include your assigned responsibility and important information related to the work reviewed in this Skill Review.
trainee-sr-setup-tour.sr-additional-notes: Add Additional Notes if necessary. This is an optional field for any extra information you want to include.
trainee-sr-setup-tour.sr-new-review-btn: Click New Review to save the information and create your Skill Review. You will then proceed to rating your skills.

trainee-sr-rate-tour.step-0: Now you will rate your skills, provide evidence, and add comments for both Essential and Technical Performance Objectives.
trainee-sr-rate-tour.sr-essential-header: This section contains the Essential Performance Objectives. You will rate each competency under the relevant outcome topics.
trainee-sr-rate-tour.sr-outcome-1: Click on the Outcome topic to view all the competencies linked to it. A tick mark under the L column indicates that you have done self-assessment on one or more competencies related to that outcome.
trainee-sr-rate-tour.sr-rating-select: Click on the rating scale and select a rate for each competency. Options range from Not Yet Competent to Advanced.
trainee-sr-rate-tour.sr-evidence-input: Capture evidence presented in support of the rate. Provide specific details using the STAR method. Describe the Situation, the Task you were given, the Action you took, and the Result of your actions.
trainee-sr-rate-tour.sr-submit-btn: Once relevant competencies have been rated, click on Submit to save your changes.
trainee-sr-rate-tour.sr-technical-header: Now rate the Technical Performance Objectives. The process is the same: click on the Outcome topic to view competencies, select a rating, capture activities performed using the STAR method, and click Submit to save.
trainee-sr-rate-tour.sr-tech-table: Click on each technical outcome topic such as Auditing and Assurance, Financial Accounting and Reporting, Management Accounting, and Taxation to rate the related competencies.
trainee-sr-rate-tour.sr-doc-complete-btn: Once you have rated the competencies for this review period, click Document Complete to proceed. The tick marks under L will show which outcomes you have completed self-assessment on.
trainee-sr-rate-tour.sr-finish-btn: Click Finish to open the ACCA Audit Units page. You can also use the Print hyperlink to view a detailed Skill Review report before proceeding.

trainee-sr-acca-tour.step-0: Complete the ACCA Audit Units section before signing off your Skill Review. Select the appropriate audit type and fill in the required details.
trainee-sr-acca-tour.acca-audit-type: Select the audit type. Choose Not Applicable if the skill review does not fall under High-risk audits and related work assurance, or Low-risk assurance work. Select High-risk audits if the work performed involves high-risk audits. Select Low-risk assurance if the work performed involves low-risk assurance work.
trainee-sr-acca-tour.acca-other-hours: Capture Other Work Hours. These are hours not included in any Audit Class above. This may include non-chargeable time, or time spent working in other areas such as research, payroll, tax, or insolvency.
trainee-sr-acca-tour.acca-high-risk-section: If High-risk audits and related assurance work is selected, you must complete every section on this page before signing off the skill review. This includes Number of Clients, Audit Class hours, Other work hours, Client sectors, and Client Size.
trainee-sr-acca-tour.acca-num-clients: Update the Number of Clients for this audit engagement.
trainee-sr-acca-tour.acca-audit-hours: Update the Audit Class hours for the work performed during this period.
trainee-sr-acca-tour.acca-client-sector: Select one or more Client sectors related to the work performed. Options include Financial Services, Mining, Manufacturing, Retail, and Public Sector.
trainee-sr-acca-tour.acca-client-size: Select the Client Size. This can also be classified by the firm. Hover over the information icon for more details about size classifications.
trainee-sr-acca-tour.acca-elements-table: Select one or more elements related to the work performed. For each element selected, capture the Date of achievement and a Statement of achievement describing what was accomplished.
trainee-sr-acca-tour.acca-signoff-btn: Click on Sign Off Skill Review to proceed to the sign-off declaration page where you will formally submit your Skill Review.

trainee-sr-signoff-tour.step-0: This is the final step. Read the declaration carefully and agree to submit your Skill Review to your Reviewer or Supervisor for assessment.
trainee-sr-signoff-tour.sr-declaration: Read the declaration carefully before clicking on Agree. This confirms that the information you provided in this Skill Review is a true and accurate representation of the work performed and the competencies demonstrated.
trainee-sr-signoff-tour.sr-agree-btn: Click Agree to sign off and submit your Skill Review to your Reviewer or Supervisor for assessment. You will be notified once the review has been completed.
trainee-sr-signoff-tour.sr-print-link: Use the Print hyperlink to view and print a detailed Skill Review report. You can review this report before or after signing off.

reviewer-sr-home-tour.step-0: Welcome to the Reviewer and Supervisor Home Page. You will review Skill Reviews that have been assigned to you by trainees.
reviewer-sr-home-tour.rv-profile-select: Select Reviewer or Supervisor permission if you have multiple permissions linked to your profile. This ensures you access the system with the correct role.
reviewer-sr-home-tour.rv-continue-btn: Click on Continue to navigate to the Home Page with your Reviewer permissions active.
reviewer-sr-home-tour.rv-sr-link: On the Home page, click on the assigned Skill Review hyperlink to begin your review. Skill Reviews awaiting your review will appear under Open Items.

reviewer-sr-review-tour.step-0: Review the Trainee's Essential and Technical Performance Objectives. You can update ratings, rate unrated skills, and add your comments.
reviewer-sr-review-tour.rv-actions-bar: As a Reviewer or Supervisor, you have the option to Edit the Skill Review setup, or Send the Skill Review back to the Trainee for amendments if changes are needed.
reviewer-sr-review-tour.rv-outcome-table: Click on the outcome hyperlink to open skills related to the outcome. A tick mark under L indicates skills rated by the Trainee. Click on each outcome to view and review the related competencies.
reviewer-sr-review-tour.rv-outcome-1: Review the Trainee's Essential Performance Objectives. You can update the Trainee's rating and also rate skills that were NOT rated by the Trainee. Different ratings between you and the Trainee will lead to the rating differences stage.
reviewer-sr-review-tour.rv-reviewer-rating-col: Select your rating for each competency. You can update the Trainee's existing rating or rate skills the Trainee has not rated. Any rating differences will be flagged for resolution.
reviewer-sr-review-tour.rv-comment-col: Add your Reviewer or Supervisor comments for each competency assessed. You can see the Trainee's evidence presented in support of their rating and comment.
reviewer-sr-review-tour.rv-submit-btn: Click Submit to save your changes for the Essential Performance Objectives.
reviewer-sr-review-tour.rv-technical-header: Now review the Trainee's Technical Performance Objectives. The process is the same: you can update the Trainee's rating, rate unrated skills, add comments, and click Submit to save your changes.
reviewer-sr-review-tour.rv-doc-complete-btn: Once all skills have been reviewed, click Document Complete to proceed. Tick marks under both L and S indicate that skills have been rated and reviewed by both the Trainee and the Reviewer or Supervisor.
reviewer-sr-review-tour.rv-finish-btn: Click Finish to navigate to the ACCA Audit Units page. You can also use the Print hyperlink to view a detailed Skill Review report.

reviewer-sr-acca-tour.step-0: Review the ACCA Audit Units completed by the Trainee. You can update values, agree or disagree with the Trainee, and add your Reviewer or Supervisor comment.
reviewer-sr-acca-tour.rv-acca-clients: As a Reviewer or Supervisor, you can update the Number of Clients, the Audit class hours, Other work hours, Client sectors, and Client Size.
reviewer-sr-acca-tour.rv-agree-col: Review the elements and Statement of Achievement submitted by the Trainee. You can Agree or Disagree with each element. If you disagree, you should provide a comment explaining why.
reviewer-sr-acca-tour.rv-acca-comment-col: Add your Reviewer or Supervisor comment for each element. Your comments will be visible to the Trainee.
reviewer-sr-acca-tour.rv-acca-send-back: If any amendments are required, you can send the Skill Review back to the Trainee for corrections. The Trainee will be notified and can make the necessary changes.
reviewer-sr-acca-tour.rv-acca-signoff-btn: Click on Sign Off to finalise the skill review and proceed to the declaration page.

reviewer-sr-signoff-tour.step-0: This is the final step. Read the declaration and agree to finalise the Skill Review.
reviewer-sr-signoff-tour.rv-declaration: Read the declaration carefully. By clicking Agree, you confirm that you have reviewed and assessed the Trainee's competencies and that your ratings and comments are a fair and accurate reflection of their performance.
reviewer-sr-signoff-tour.rv-agree-btn: Click Agree to finalise the Skill Review. Both the Trainee and the Reviewer or Supervisor will receive notification that the review has been completed.

reviewer-rd-email-tour.step-0: If there are any rating differences between the Trainee and Reviewer, they will appear on the Reviewer or Supervisor rating difference page. The Reviewer or Supervisor will receive an email notification of the assigned Skill Review with rating differences.
reviewer-rd-email-tour.rd-email-panel: This is the email notification you receive when there are rating differences. It lists the specific competencies where the Trainee and Reviewer ratings differ, along with the revised ratings and comments. Review these discrepancies before proceeding to resolve them.

reviewer-rd-resolve-tour.step-0: As the Reviewer or Supervisor, you will now resolve the rating differences. Click on each competency to capture revised ratings and add your comments.
reviewer-rd-resolve-tour.rd-warning-header: The Rating Differences warning header shows all competencies where the Trainee and Reviewer or Supervisor ratings are different. These must be resolved before the Skill Review can be finalised.
reviewer-rd-resolve-tour.rd-note: Important note: If there are no ratings under Final, which is the blue column, the supervisor still needs to enter revised ratings. Only once the revised ratings have been entered will the Trainee be able to resolve the rating differences.
reviewer-rd-resolve-tour.rd-essential-table: Click on the Essential Performance Objective competency hyperlink to open the rating difference page. The T column shows the Trainee's rating and the S column shows the Supervisor's rating.
reviewer-rd-resolve-tour.rd-technical-table: Review the Technical Performance Objectives the same way. Click on each competency to open the rating difference detail page and enter your revised rating.
reviewer-rd-resolve-tour.rd-trainee-evidence: Review the Trainee's original rating and the evidence they presented in support of their self-assessment. This helps you understand the Trainee's perspective.
reviewer-rd-resolve-tour.rd-revised-rating: As the Reviewer or Supervisor, update the revised rating for this competency. Select the appropriate rating from the dropdown. This will become the final rating.
reviewer-rd-resolve-tour.rd-comment: A comment is required when there is a rating difference. Explain clearly why you have assigned this revised rating so the Trainee understands your assessment.
reviewer-rd-resolve-tour.rd-accept-btn: Click Accept to save your revised ratings and assign the Skill Review back to the Trainee. The Trainee will then review your revised ratings and agree or disagree.

trainee-rd-email-tour.step-0: The Trainee receives an email notification when the Supervisor has indicated rating differences on their Skill Review. You must contact your Supervisor to discuss the discrepancies before finalising the document.
trainee-rd-email-tour.rd-trainee-email-panel: This email notification lists the competencies with rating differences, the revised ratings from your Supervisor, and their comments. Contact your Supervisor as soon as possible to discuss these differences before you finalise.

trainee-rd-resolve-tour.step-0: As the Trainee, you will now resolve the rating differences. Click on your assigned Skill Review, review the Supervisor's revised ratings, and agree or disagree with each one.
trainee-rd-resolve-tour.rd-open-items: Click on the assigned Skill Review hyperlink. It will be marked as With Trainee, Rating Diff. This opens the rating differences page where you can see all the competencies with different ratings.
trainee-rd-resolve-tour.rd-differences-table: The Rating Differences table shows the Trainee rating in green, the Supervisor rating in yellow, and the Final revised rating in blue for each competency where differences exist.
trainee-rd-resolve-tour.rd-supervisor-comment: Review the Supervisor's revised rating and their comment explaining why they assigned a different rating. This information helps you understand their assessment.
trainee-rd-resolve-tour.rd-resolve-select: Select Agree With Supervisor if you accept the revised rating, or Disagree With Supervisor if you do not agree. It is recommended to meet with your Supervisor to discuss any disagreements.
trainee-rd-resolve-tour.rd-trainee-comment: Add your comment explaining your position on the rating difference. Whether you agree or disagree, provide your reasoning.
trainee-rd-resolve-tour.rd-trainee-accept-btn: Click Accept to finalise the Skill Review. Please note that the skill review will be finalised even if you disagree with the Reviewer or Supervisor.

trainee-6na-home-tour.step-0: Welcome to the LTS Home Page. From here you will initiate a Six Monthly Needs Analysis by clicking on the Link to 6 N A's hyperlink. Let's walk through the key sections on this page first.
trainee-6na-home-tour.na-link-6na: Click on the hyperlink Link to 6 N A's to initiate a new Six Monthly Needs Analysis. This will take you to the 6 N A setup page.
trainee-6na-home-tour.na-setup-panel: This is the 6 N A setup page. You need to fill in the required details to create your Six Monthly Needs Analysis.
trainee-6na-home-tour.na-supervisor-select: Select your Authorised Supervisor from the dropdown list. If you cannot find your supervisor, click Show All Users.
trainee-6na-home-tour.na-principal-select: Select the Principal from the dropdown list. The Principal is the person responsible for overseeing your training contract.
trainee-6na-home-tour.na-number: Update the A N A Number if required. This is the sequence number for your Needs Analysis.
trainee-6na-home-tour.na-review-period: Set the 6 N A Review Period Start Date and End Date. This defines the six-month period being assessed.
trainee-6na-home-tour.na-add-btn: Click Add 6 N A to save the setup information and create your Six Monthly Needs Analysis. You will then proceed to complete the sections.

trainee-6na-self-eval-tour.step-0: Now update Section 2: Self-Evaluation. Complete your self-evaluation by capturing your major assignments and academic record for this period.
trainee-6na-self-eval-tour.na-self-eval-link: Click on the hyperlink Section 2: Self-Evaluation to open the self-evaluation form. The indicator shows what needs to be done and by whom.
trainee-6na-self-eval-tour.na-self-eval-panel: This section is mainly concerned with self-evaluation by the Trainee. The Authorised Supervisor should review each section and provide input where necessary.
trainee-6na-self-eval-tour.na-major-assignment: Capture your Major Assignment for the next six-month period. Describe the work you are scheduled to undertake and provide details of expected tasks and responsibilities.
trainee-6na-self-eval-tour.na-next-btn: Click Next to proceed to the academic record section.
trainee-6na-self-eval-tour.na-academic-record: Capture your Academic record. If relevant, document the state of your academic progress during this six-month period. This should include whether your studies are on track to pass or not.
trainee-6na-self-eval-tour.na-finish-btn: Click Finish to save your self-evaluation and proceed to the next section.

trainee-6na-supp-training-tour.step-0: Now update Section 2: Record of Supplementary Training. Capture all courses attended during the preceding six-month period.
trainee-6na-supp-training-tour.na-supp-training-link: Click on the hyperlink Section 2: Record of Supplementary Training to open the training record form.
trainee-6na-supp-training-tour.na-training-course: Enter the Training Course name. For example, Advance Excel or any other course you attended during this period.
trainee-6na-supp-training-tour.na-learning-objectives: Capture the Learning Objectives for the course. Describe what you learned and the skills gained.
trainee-6na-supp-training-tour.na-transfer-examples: Select Examples of Transfer to indicate whether the learning from this course was transferred to the workplace. Select Not Applicable if it was not transferred.
trainee-6na-supp-training-tour.na-result: Select the Result of the training. Options include In Progress, Completed, or Not Applicable.
trainee-6na-supp-training-tour.na-add-course-btn: Click Add to save the course information and create a new entry. You can add multiple courses attended during the period.
trainee-6na-supp-training-tour.na-evaluator-comment: The Trainee can add a comment on the action decided on the transfer of learning. If learning was transferred, describe how it was applied in the workplace.
trainee-6na-supp-training-tour.na-update-btn: Click Update to save all changes to the Record of Supplementary Training.

trainee-6na-acca-tour.step-0: Complete the ACCA Audit Units and then proceed to sign off. First click Document Complete, then update all the audit information on this page.
trainee-6na-acca-tour.na-doc-complete-btn: Click Document Complete to navigate to the ACCA Audit Units page. This button indicates that you have completed all required sections of the 6 N A.
trainee-6na-acca-tour.na-time-summary: The Six Monthly Needs Analysis Time Summary shows the period dates and audit information. You can update the period start and end dates, hours, number of clients, and other work hours.
trainee-6na-acca-tour.na-client-sectors: Select one or more Client Sectors related to the work performed during this period. Options include Banking, Insurance, IT communications, Manufacturing, and others.
trainee-6na-acca-tour.na-client-size: Select the Client Size classification. Options are Small, Medium, or Large.
trainee-6na-acca-tour.na-unit-section: Review the audit unit details. This shows the unit, elements, date, and your statement of achievement for the audit process.
trainee-6na-acca-tour.na-overall-statement: Capture your Overall Statement of Achievement. ACCA can only consider client-specific examples where the member has worked or been personally involved. Please use the STAR format to describe your achievements.
trainee-6na-acca-tour.na-complete-btn: Click Complete Six Monthly Needs Analysis to assign the 6 N A to your Authorised Supervisor for review and sign-off.

trainee-6na-signoff-tour.step-0: This is the final step. Read the declaration carefully before clicking Agree to finalise your Six Monthly Needs Analysis.
trainee-6na-signoff-tour.na-please-note: Please Note: This is an important declaration. Read it carefully before proceeding with the sign-off.
trainee-6na-signoff-tour.na-declaration: The declaration states: By clicking Agree, you confirm that the work submitted is a true and accurate reflection of your work experience. The information provided is genuine, and you acknowledge full responsibility for its authenticity.
trainee-6na-signoff-tour.na-next-steps: Next Steps: Once you click Agree, no further changes can be made. The Authorised Supervisor will then be able to access and review the 6 N A.
trainee-6na-signoff-tour.na-agree-btn: Click Agree to finalise and submit your Six Monthly Needs Analysis to the Authorised Supervisor. You will be notified once the review has been completed.

supervisor-6na-home-tour.step-0: Welcome to the Authorised Supervisor Home Page. From here you will review and complete Stage 2 of a Six Monthly Needs Analysis assigned to you by a Trainee.
supervisor-6na-home-tour.as-profile-select: Select Authorised Supervisor if you have multiple permissions linked to your profile. This ensures you access the system with the correct role.
supervisor-6na-home-tour.as-continue-btn: Click Continue to navigate to the Home Page with your Authorised Supervisor permissions active.
supervisor-6na-home-tour.as-6na-link: Click on the Six Monthly Needs Analysis hyperlink to review the 6 N A. The status shows the current stage and who needs to take action.

supervisor-6na-review-tour.step-0: As the Authorised Supervisor, you will now review the 6 N A. This includes reviewing the Trainee's self-evaluation, supplementary training, updating the Summary of Performance Evaluations, and completing the Conclusion.
supervisor-6na-review-tour.as-6na-info: Review the 6 N A details including the Trainee name, review period, and current status. You can also edit user information or the 6 N A details by clicking the edit link.
supervisor-6na-review-tour.as-section1-link: Click on Section 1: Summary of Performance Evaluations to review and update the overall rating level achieved by the Trainee to date. The indicators show what needs to be done and by whom.
supervisor-6na-review-tour.as-srs-included: You can link or delink Skill Reviews to this 6 N A. Linked Skill Reviews will be included in the assessment. Click the Hyperlink Link or Delink button to manage the S Rs.
supervisor-6na-review-tour.as-perf-eval-panel: Click on each Topic to open all competencies linked to that topic. Tick marks indicate competencies that were rated in the Skill Review. Review each performance objective area.
supervisor-6na-review-tour.as-extended-view: In the Extended View, you can mark competencies as Ready for Final Sign Off, mark Development Required if major intervention is needed, mark competencies for Discussion, and add your Authorised Supervisor Comment.
supervisor-6na-review-tour.as-ready-signoff-col: Mark competencies as Ready for Final Sign Off if the Trainee has met the expected level and needs to be signed off.
supervisor-6na-review-tour.as-dev-required-col: Mark Development Required only when major intervention is needed, or if the Trainee performs below the expected level. This flags areas needing attention.
supervisor-6na-review-tour.as-marked-discussion-col: Mark specific competencies that should be discussed during the one-on-one meeting with the Trainee.
supervisor-6na-review-tour.as-comment-col: Add your comments or supporting notes for specific competencies. These comments provide feedback to the Trainee.
supervisor-6na-review-tour.as-submit-btn: Click Submit to save your changes. You can also use Hide Unrated S Rs to focus only on rated competencies.
supervisor-6na-review-tour.as-doc-complete-btn: Once all competencies have been reviewed and updated, click Document Complete to proceed.
supervisor-6na-review-tour.as-conclusion-panel: Click on the Conclusion section to update. This should be completed by the Authorised Supervisor with the input of the trainee accountant. Comment on the effectiveness of the previous period's developmental plan.
supervisor-6na-review-tour.as-conclusion-update-btn: Once done, click Update to save your conclusion comments and proceed.
supervisor-6na-review-tour.as-finish-btn: Once all sections have been reviewed, click Finish to navigate to the ACCA Audit Units page.

supervisor-6na-acca-tour.step-0: As the Authorised Supervisor, review the ACCA Audit Units page. You can update values, review the Trainee's statement of achievement, and add your Authorised Supervisor comment before signing off.
supervisor-6na-acca-tour.as-time-summary: Review and update the Period Start and End Dates, Number of Clients on High-risk and Low-risk work, Hours, and Other Work Hours. You can click Reload values from S Rs to refresh values from the linked Skill Reviews.
supervisor-6na-acca-tour.as-client-sectors: Review and update the Client Sectors related to the work performed during this period.
supervisor-6na-acca-tour.as-client-size: Review and update the Client Size classification. Hover over the information icon for more details about size classifications.
supervisor-6na-acca-tour.as-unit-section: Review the audit unit, elements, date of achievement, and the Trainee's statement of achievement. Verify that the information is accurate and complete.
supervisor-6na-acca-tour.as-overall-statement: Review the Trainee's Overall Statement of Achievement. ACCA can only consider client-specific examples where the member has worked or been personally involved.
supervisor-6na-acca-tour.as-principal-review: Review and update the Principal Review section. This includes a summary of work performance, evaluation against previous targets, future development needs, and performance targets for the next period.
supervisor-6na-acca-tour.as-supervisor-comment: Add your Authorised Supervisor comment. This is your assessment and feedback for the Trainee's development during this review period.
supervisor-6na-acca-tour.as-signoff-btn: Once everything has been reviewed and updated, click Sign Off Six Monthly Needs Analysis to proceed to the sign-off declaration page.

supervisor-6na-signoff-tour.step-0: This is the final step. As the Authorised Supervisor, you will now sign off the Six Monthly Needs Analysis to complete Stage 2.
supervisor-6na-signoff-tour.as-signoff-notice: This sign off indicates that both the Trainee and the Authorised Supervisor, after having met and discussed this 6 N A, agree with the contents of this document.
supervisor-6na-signoff-tour.as-signoff-btn: Click Sign Off to finalise and complete Stage 2 of the Six Monthly Needs Analysis. The Trainee will be notified, and the 6 N A will move to the next stage.

trainee-s3-home-tour.step-0: Login to L T Systems dot co dot za with your Trainee profile. You will review the assigned Six Monthly Needs Analysis to complete Stage 3.
trainee-s3-home-tour.s3-6na-link: Click on the Six Monthly Needs Analysis hyperlink to open the 6 N A. The status shows Stage 5: With Trainee, meaning it is ready for your review and sign-off.

trainee-s3-review-tour.step-0: Review the Six Monthly Needs Analysis and check if all sections are updated as discussed with the Authorised Supervisor. You can view ratings, comments, and competencies but cannot update Authorised Supervisor comments.
trainee-s3-review-tour.s3-6na-info: Review the 6 N A details including the Trainee name, Authorised Supervisor, review period, and sign-off dates. The status shows With Trainee: Awaiting Trainee Sign-Off.
trainee-s3-review-tour.s3-section-links: Click on each section to review the content. The coloured indicators show the completion status. Click on Summary of Performance Evaluations, Self-Evaluation, and Conclusion to review the Authorised Supervisor's updates.
trainee-s3-review-tour.s3-validate-panel: Click on Validate to view the validation report with ratings and Authorised Supervisor comments, and competencies that are marked as Ready for final sign off. Tick marks indicate that competencies related to the outcomes have been rated in the Six Monthly Needs Analysis.
trainee-s3-review-tour.s3-self-eval-panel: Click on Self-Evaluation to view Authorised Supervisor Comments. Read the comments on major assignments and academic record. Once you are done, click Next, then read comments on Academic Record and click Close. Please note: Authorised Supervisor comments cannot be updated.
trainee-s3-review-tour.s3-conclusion-panel: Click on Conclusion to review the Authorised Supervisor's comments on the effectiveness of the developmental plan, technical skills, and professional skills. Once done, click Close. Please note: Authorised Supervisor comments cannot be updated.
trainee-s3-review-tour.s3-finish-btn: Once you have reviewed all sections, click Finish to navigate to the ACCA Audit Units page.

trainee-s3-acca-tour.step-0: Review the ACCA Audit Units page. As a Trainee, you can only review the information on this page. You cannot update anything. If all is in order, click Signoff Six Monthly Needs Analysis.
trainee-s3-acca-tour.s3-readonly-notice: Please Note: As the Trainee, you cannot update anything on this page. This page is for review purposes only.
trainee-s3-acca-tour.s3-time-summary: Review the Six Monthly Needs Analysis Time Summary. This includes Period Start and End Dates, Number of Clients on High-risk and Low-risk work, Hours, and Other Work Hours.
trainee-s3-acca-tour.s3-client-sectors: Review the Client Sectors related to the work performed during this period. These have been set by the Authorised Supervisor.
trainee-s3-acca-tour.s3-client-size: Review the Client Size classification. This has been set by the Authorised Supervisor.
trainee-s3-acca-tour.s3-signoff-6na-btn: If all information is in order, click Signoff Six Monthly Needs Analysis to proceed to the sign-off page.

trainee-s3-signoff-tour.step-0: This is the final step. Review the ACCA Audit Unit details and Principal Review, then sign off the Six Monthly Needs Analysis to complete Stage 3.
trainee-s3-signoff-tour.s3-unit-section: Review the audit unit details including the Client Description, Elements, date of achievement, and your Statement. Verify that the information is accurate and complete.
trainee-s3-signoff-tour.s3-overall-statement: Review the Overall Statement of Achievement. ACCA can only consider client-specific examples where the member has worked or been personally involved.
trainee-s3-signoff-tour.s3-principal-review: Review the Principal Review section including summary of work performance, evaluation against previous targets, future development needs, and performance targets for the next period.
trainee-s3-signoff-tour.s3-signoff-nav-btn: Once you have reviewed everything and all is in order, click Signoff Six Monthly Needs Analysis to proceed to the sign-off declaration.
trainee-s3-signoff-tour.s3-signoff-notice: This sign off indicates that both the Trainee and the Authorised Supervisor, after having met and discussed this 6 N A, agree with the contents of this document.
trainee-s3-signoff-tour.s3-signoff-btn: Click Sign Off to finalise and complete Stage 3 of the Six Monthly Needs Analysis. The 6 N A will then move to the Principal for the final quality check.

principal-6na-home-tour.step-0: As the Principal, you will review the 6 N A in respect of the overall ratings and the integrity of the assessment process. Click on the assigned 6 N A hyperlink to begin.
principal-6na-home-tour.pr-6na-link: Click on the assigned 6 N A hyperlink to review the A N A. You can also use Print to display the detail report, Extended Score Grid to view ratings, and Reverse To Not Competent to reverse a signed off competency.
principal-6na-home-tour.pr-prepare-info: Before reviewing, familiarise yourself with the available reports: Score Grid, Extended Score Grid, ACCA Time Summary Report, and ACCA Principal Review Extract.
principal-6na-home-tour.pr-report-links: Access the Six Monthly Needs Analysis Score Grid, Extended Score Grid, ACCA Time Summary Report, and ACCA Principal Review Extract Report from these links.
principal-6na-home-tour.pr-signoff-btn: Click Sign Off to proceed with reviewing and signing off the Six Monthly Needs Analysis.

principal-6na-review-tour.step-0: Review the closed Six Monthly Needs Analysis. The Principal reviews Section 1 Summary of Performance Evaluations, Self-Evaluation, Record of Supplementary Training, and Conclusion. Note: The Principal cannot edit any of the sections on this page.
principal-6na-review-tour.pr-6na-info: Review the 6 N A details including Trainee name, Authorised Supervisor, review period, and sign-off dates.
principal-6na-review-tour.pr-send-back: If amendments are required, click this hyperlink to reverse the 6 N A back to Stage 2 with the Authorised Supervisor for amendments.
principal-6na-review-tour.pr-section-links: Review the Summary of Performance Evaluations, Self-Evaluation, Record of Supplementary Training, and Conclusion. Note: Principal cannot edit any of these sections.
principal-6na-review-tour.pr-continue-btn: Click Continue to proceed to the Performance Evaluations view where you can review and update ratings.
principal-6na-review-tour.pr-perf-eval-panel: The tick under A S indicates competencies the Authorised Supervisor marked as Ready for final sign off. Click on a Topic Hyperlink to open the Extended View to review and update the A N A.
principal-6na-review-tour.pr-extended-view: In the Extended View, the Principal can update ratings, mark competencies as Ready for Final Sign Off, add comments, decide on the Overall Rating from Not Yet Competent to Competent, and add a Principal Sign Off Comment.
principal-6na-review-tour.pr-rating-col: The Principal can update the 6 N A rating if necessary.
principal-6na-review-tour.pr-ready-signoff-col: The Principal can mark a competency as Ready for Final Sign Off if the Authorised Supervisor missed it.
principal-6na-review-tour.pr-as-comment-col: The Principal can add comments if relevant in the Principal or Authorised Supervisor comment text box.
principal-6na-review-tour.pr-overall-rating-col: Where relevant, the Principal should decide if the Overall Rating should change from Not Yet Competent to Competent.
principal-6na-review-tour.pr-signoff-comment-col: The Principal can give a Principal Sign Off Comment for competencies marked as Ready for Final Sign Off.
principal-6na-review-tour.pr-submit-btn: Click Submit to save your changes and proceed.
principal-6na-review-tour.pr-continue-acca-btn: Once all competencies have been reviewed, click Continue to navigate to the ACCA Audit Units page.

principal-6na-acca-tour.step-0: As the Principal, you can update the Time Summary, review the Overall Statement of Achievement, update the Principal Review and Comments, and then click Signoff Six Monthly Needs Analysis.
principal-6na-acca-tour.pr-time-summary: The Principal can update the Period Start and End Dates, Number of Clients, Hours, Other Work Hours, Client Sectors, and Client Size. Click Reload values from S Rs to refresh values.
principal-6na-acca-tour.pr-client-sectors: Review and update the Client Sectors related to the work performed during this period.
principal-6na-acca-tour.pr-client-size: Review and update the Client Size classification.
principal-6na-acca-tour.pr-unit-section: Review the audit unit details including Client Description, Elements, date, and Statement.
principal-6na-acca-tour.pr-overall-statement: Review the Overall Statement of Achievement. ACCA can only consider client-specific examples where the member has worked or been personally involved.
principal-6na-acca-tour.pr-principal-review: Update the Principal Review including summary of work performance, evaluation against previous targets, future development needs, performance targets, and Principal comments.
principal-6na-acca-tour.pr-declaration: Read the declaration carefully. By signing off, you confirm agreement with the summary of work performance and targets.
principal-6na-acca-tour.pr-signoff-6na-btn: Click Signoff Six Monthly Needs Analysis to proceed to the sign-off page.

principal-6na-signoff-tour.step-0: This is the final step. Add your Principal Comment and sign off the Six Monthly Needs Analysis to complete the process.
principal-6na-signoff-tour.pr-signoff-notice: This sign off indicates that both the Trainee and the Authorised Supervisor, after having met and discussed this 6 N A, agree with the contents of this document.
principal-6na-signoff-tour.pr-review-declaration: This sign off indicates that the Principal reviewed and is in agreement with the integrity of ratings, overall competence assessment, adequacy of the developmental plan, and credibility of the assessment process.
principal-6na-signoff-tour.pr-comment-area: Add your Principal comment on the trainee's overall rating. Principal comments will automatically appear here and can be updated.
principal-6na-signoff-tour.pr-signoff-btn: Click Sign Off to finalise the Six Monthly Needs Analysis. The 6 N A will be completed and the Trainee will receive an email notification.

principal-6na-reports-tour.step-0: As the Principal, you can access various reports for each Trainee. Click on Signoff A N A's under the Learner's section to view reports for a specific Trainee.
principal-6na-reports-tour.pr-report-nav: Access the Six Monthly Needs Analysis Score Grid, Extended Score Grid, ACCA Time Summary Report, and ACCA Principal Review Extract Report.
principal-6na-reports-tour.pr-time-summary-report: The ACCA Time Summary Report returns the High-risk audits and related assurance work and Low-risk assurance work hours for the Six Monthly Needs Analysis period. You can export to PDF.
principal-6na-reports-tour.pr-principal-extract: The ACCA Principal Review Extract Report returns the Principal Review data extract. Click Generate Report to create the report, which shows summary of work performance, evaluation of targets, development needs, and Principal comments.

sendback-email-tour.step-0: Welcome to the Edit or Send Back Skill Review tour. In this tour you will learn how a Reviewer or Supervisor can edit Skill Review setup information, or send a Skill Review back to the Trainee for amendments.
sendback-email-tour.sb-email-panel: The Reviewer or Supervisor receives an email notification of the assigned Skill Review. It shows the Trainee's name and the client the Skill Review was created for.
sendback-email-tour.sb-email-logon: Log in to www dot L T Systems dot co dot za with your Supervisor permission to review the Skill Review.
sendback-email-tour.sb-profile-select: If you have multiple permissions linked to your profile, select the Reviewer or Supervisor profile before continuing.

sendback-home-tour.step-0: After logging in with the Reviewer or Supervisor profile, you land on the Supervisor Home page, where your open Skill Reviews are listed.
sendback-home-tour.sb-open-reviews: Open Reviews lists all documents in progress where the Reviewer or Supervisor is selected. The status on the right indicates to whom the Skill Review is currently assigned, and what to do.
sendback-home-tour.sb-sr-status: This Skill Review shows Supervisor not complete, which means it is currently assigned to you. Print gives a view of the document as it is currently updated.
sendback-home-tour.sb-sr-link: Click on the document type hyperlink to open the assigned Skill Review where the status is with the Supervisor or Reviewer.

sendback-review-tour.step-0: The Skill Review opens, showing the setup information and the performance objectives rated by the Trainee.
sendback-review-tour.sb-setup-info: Check the Skill Review setup information. This includes the Supervisor, client description, dates, days worked, assignment description, and additional notes.
sendback-review-tour.sb-sendback-link: Click on the Send Back S R or Edit Setup Information hyperlink to send the Skill Review back to the Trainee, or to edit the setup information.
sendback-review-tour.sb-essential-header: Below the setup information you can see the Essential and Technical Performance Objectives. Highlighted sections indicate outcomes not yet rated and signed off.

sendback-reset-tour.step-0: On the Reset Skill Review page you can update the setup information, or send the Skill Review back to the Trainee to make all necessary changes.
sendback-reset-tour.sb-client-desc: Change the description of the client if it needs correcting.
sendback-reset-tour.sb-job-dates: Update the job start date, job end date, and the days worked on the job. The calculated work days are shown for reference.
sendback-reset-tour.sb-assignment-desc: Update the assignment description and any additional notes for the Skill Review.
sendback-reset-tour.sb-update-btn: Click Update to save your changes to the setup information without sending the Skill Review back.
sendback-reset-tour.sb-sendback-btn: Click Send Back to Trainee if the Trainee needs to make the amendments themselves. You will be asked to add a comment for the Trainee on the next screen.

sendback-reversal-tour.step-0: This page confirms the reversal of the Skill Review back to the Trainee.
sendback-reversal-tour.sb-reversal-note: Read the notes carefully. The Trainee's initial sign off date will be cleared, and the document reverts to step one, with the status With Trainee. Once the Trainee finalises the amendments, the document is re-assigned to the Supervisor.
sendback-reversal-tour.sb-reversal-comment: Add a comment or instructions for the Trainee, so they know exactly which amendments to make. This comment is included in the Trainee's email notification.
sendback-reversal-tour.sb-reversal-actions: Click Send Back to Trainee to send the Skill Review back, or Cancel to return without sending it back.

sendback-trainee-email-tour.step-0: The Trainee receives an email notification that the Skill Review has been sent back, with instructions from the Reviewer or Supervisor.
sendback-trainee-email-tour.sb-sendback-notice: The email confirms that the Skill Review has been sent back to the Trainee profile to make the required amendments.
sendback-trainee-email-tour.sb-instruction-block: The Supervisor's reversal comment appears here, so the Trainee knows exactly what to amend before assigning the Skill Review back.

sendback-trainee-home-tour.step-0: The Trainee logs on to L T S with the Trainee profile. The sent back Skill Review appears under Open Items on the Learner Home page.
sendback-trainee-home-tour.sb-days-since: The Days Since Last table shows when the Skill Review was initiated, last worked on, and finalised.
sendback-trainee-home-tour.sb-open-sr-link: The Trainee opens the Skill Review to make the amendments as the Reviewer or Supervisor has instructed.
sendback-trainee-home-tour.sb-finish-btn: After all amendments are made, the Trainee clicks Finish to assign the Skill Review back to the Reviewer or Supervisor for them to review.

sendback-signoff-tour.step-0: After making the amendments, the Trainee completes the Audit Units page and signs off the Skill Review to assign it back to the Reviewer or Supervisor.
sendback-signoff-tour.sb-instruction-reminder: The Supervisor's instruction is shown as a reminder of the amendments required before signing off.
sendback-signoff-tour.sb-audit-class: Select the audit class if relevant, and complete all the audit class sections.
sendback-signoff-tour.sb-other-hours: Capture any hours not included in the audit class selected above.
sendback-signoff-tour.sb-signoff-btn: Click Sign Off Skill Review to assign it to the Reviewer or Supervisor. A declaration will appear. Read it carefully before clicking Agree.
